name: agent-browser
description: Safe browser runtime manager for the current LocalTopSH per-user sandbox. Use for webpages, screenshots, persistent login profiles, classic noVNC/manual desktop, downloads, protected artifact reading, generic pagination navigation, and Saby/SBIS tender CSV export through actions like open, snapshot, manual_desktop, desktop_open, continue_after_manual, read_artifact, smart_read, find_text, navigate_pagination, downloads, and saby_tenders_csv.
author: LocalTopSH

tools.name: browser
tools.description: Skill-owned browser automation tool. Runs only through the per-user sandbox and wraps agent-browser CLI with safe profiles, artifacts, compact snapshots, protected artifact reading, pagination helpers, screenshots, login sessions, challenge handoff, manual_desktop, desktop_open, continue_after_manual, downloads, cleanup, and saby_tenders_csv export.

url.description: URL to open. Required for open/login unless command batch includes navigation.

site_key.description: Stable site/session key, e.g. github.com or github. Defaults to URL host when possible.

profile.description: Optional browser profile name. Defaults to site_key or default.

domains.description: For set_profile_alias: domains or wildcard domains that share one auth/profile group, e.g. ["example.com", "*.login.example.com"].

domain.description: For set_profile_alias: one domain or a comma/space separated domain list.

selector.description: Element ref or selector, e.g. @e3, text=Submit, #submit.

text.description: Text for fill/type/wait operations. Sensitive values are redacted from output.

filename.description: Screenshot or report filename. Must stay inside browser-artifacts.

pattern.description: For downloads: glob pattern to list/wait for inside skill-managed download artifact directories. Defaults to *.csv.

path.description: For read_artifact: full path to a file inside browser-artifacts, or an artifact run directory to auto-read the best text/json artifact.

max_chars.description: For read_artifact: maximum number of characters to return from the artifact excerpt.

target.description: For navigate_pagination: target pagination direction, one of first, prev, next, last.

filter_text.description: For saby_tenders_csv: optional substring filter applied to each visible tender row text.

subscription_text.description: For saby_tenders_csv: optional Saby subscriptions/sidebar text to select in-page before collecting, e.g. БПЛА.

date_text.description: For saby_tenders_csv: optional visible date marker for reporting; target date is controlled by target_date.

target_date.description: For saby_tenders_csv: target publish date in YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to yesterday in the browser timezone.

mode.description: For saby_tenders_csv: collect yesterday with paging, or only currently visible rows.

template.description: For saby_tenders_csv: tender-card URL template. Defaults to https://trade.saby.ru/page/tender-card/{id}.

limit.description: For saby_tenders_csv: optional maximum number of exported visible rows.

max_clicks.description: For saby_tenders_csv: max paging clicks while collecting yesterday. Defaults to 300.

delay_after_click.description: For saby_tenders_csv: milliseconds to wait after clicking next. Defaults to 350.

row_change_timeout_ms.description: For saby_tenders_csv: maximum milliseconds to wait for rows to change after paging or sidebar selection. Defaults to 2500.

stop_after_no_growth.description: For saby_tenders_csv: stop after this many next clicks add no rows. Defaults to 4.

older_batch_confirmations.description: For saby_tenders_csv: require this many consecutive new batches older than the target date before marking collection complete. Defaults to 3.

max_runtime_ms.description: For saby_tenders_csv: maximum in-page collection runtime in milliseconds. Defaults to slightly less than the tool timeout so the action can return diagnostics instead of timing out.

auto_resume_passes.description: For saby_tenders_csv: bounded extra in-page resume passes inside the same tool call when there is enough timeout budget. Defaults to 1, max 3.

initial_rows_timeout_ms.description: For saby_tenders_csv: how long to wait for Saby list rows before collecting. Defaults to 8000.

lock_wait_seconds.description: How long to wait for another browser action in the same sandbox before returning agent_browser_busy=true. Defaults to 8, max 60.

keep_manual_browser.description: For saby_tenders_csv: keep the manual browser lock after a complete export. Defaults to false so queued browser tasks can continue.

collect_after_start.description: For saby_tenders_csv: if it had to start manual desktop itself, also attempt collection in the same call. Defaults to false to avoid fresh-sandbox timeout.

force.description: For close/recover/stop actions only: explicitly interrupt another profile's manual browser lock. Defaults to false.

resume_state.description: For saby_tenders_csv: resume the previous in-page collection state for the same target date/filter/template. Defaults to true.

reset_state.description: For saby_tenders_csv: clear any previous in-page collection state before collecting. Use for a fresh run.

commands.description: Batch commands. Each item may be a command string or an array such as ["open", "https://example.com"].

task.description: Natural language task for agent-browser chat/run style automation.

script.description: JavaScript source for action=evaluate. Runs in the current manual desktop Chrome page through CDP.

skill.description: Upstream agent-browser skill name for action=skills. Defaults to core.

full.description: Use full upstream skill instructions for action=skills.

install.description: For action=start only: attempt best-effort runtime bootstrap if agent-browser is missing.

timeout.description: Command timeout in seconds. Defaults to 60, max 120.

wait_until.description: Optional load state after open. Defaults to networkidle for open/login.

json.description: Ask agent-browser for JSON output when the underlying command supports it.

screenshot.description: For challenge_detected/continue_after_manual: save a screenshot. Defaults to true.

dashboard_port.description: Dashboard/live session port. Defaults to PORT_BASE+8 inside the sandbox.

dashboard_internal_port.description: Internal agent-browser dashboard port inside sandbox. Defaults to 4848; exposed through dashboard_port via skill-managed TCP proxy.

public_host.description: Public server host for dashboard URL, without scheme. If omitted, output uses <server-host> placeholder.

public_url.description: Full externally reachable dashboard URL override.

vnc_port.description: Internal VNC port for manual_desktop. Defaults to 5900.

desktop_cdp_port.description: Internal Chrome DevTools Protocol port for manual_desktop desktop_* actions. Defaults to 9222.

display.description: X display for manual_desktop. Defaults to :99.

handoff.description: Manual challenge handoff mode for challenge_detected. Defaults to manual_desktop/noVNC.

live_check_seconds.description: For challenge_detected with manual_desktop: seconds to poll the live desktop before asking the user for manual captcha work. Defaults to 10, max 30.

query.description: For read_artifact: literal text to search for in the artifact and return matching context instead of a head/tail excerpt.

regex.description: For read_artifact: regular expression to search for in the artifact and return matching context instead of a head/tail excerpt.

context_lines.description: For read_artifact query/regex: number of surrounding lines to include around each match. Defaults to 3, max 20.
